entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "धेरै व्याख्या गर्नु अघि मलाई प्रश्नहरू सोध्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Causes of World War I"
entries.value: "प्रथम विश्वयुद्धका कारणहरू"

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "आफ्नो उत्तर दिनुअघि मेरो उत्तर जाँच्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Effects of the printing press"
entries.value: "छापाखानाका प्रभावहरू"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "मैले प्रयास गरेपछि अझ कठिन संस्करण दिनुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "यसलाई शुरुआतीका लागि सजिलो राख्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "मेरो परीक्षा, परियोजना वा दैनिक जीवनका उदाहरण प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: "Why did the Roman Empire weaken?"
entries.value: "रोमन साम्राज्य किन कमजोर भयो?"

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI प्रम्प्टहरू

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: अत्यन्त सानो first task माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: आफैंले लेखेको recap सहित end गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: For History Cause-and-Effect, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: History Cause-and-Effect का लागि उपयोगी practice loop:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: यस mode का लागि काम सरल छ: historical events लाई causes, triggers, consequences, र alternative possibilities मार्फत unpack गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: राम्रो prompts मा प्रायः तीन कुरा हुन्छन्: subject, तपाईंको current level, र तपाईंले चाहेको help को kind। perfect wording चाहिँदैन। session सुरु गर्न enough context मात्र चाहिन्छ।

entries.source: History Cause-and-Effect prompts and study loop
entries.value: History Cause-and-Effect prompts र study loop

entries.source: Humanities
entries.value: मानविकी

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: response धेरै broad लागेमा narrow गर्नुहोस्। एउटा example, एउटा misconception, एउटा check question, वा एउटा next step माग्नुहोस्। धेरै सजिलो लागेमा challenge माग्नुहोस्। धेरै कठिन लागेमा तपाईंले पहिले नै जानेको कुराबाट bridge माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: output लाई अझ useful बनाउनुहोस्

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from History Cause-and-Effect on inspir.
entries.value: inspir मा History Cause-and-Effect बाट useful learning results पाउन prompt ideas र repeatable study loop।

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI response पढ्नु learning जस्तै होइन। पहिलो answer पछि, mode लाई idea सँग तपाईंलाई केही गराउन भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Related सिकाइ मार्गहरू

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: uncertain लागेको part मा feedback request गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: solution माग्नु अघि respond गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: एउटा clear request बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: goal एक sentence मा state गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: अध्ययन सीपहरू

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: त्यो final recap important छ। idea फिर्ता explain गर्दा तपाईंले के solid छ र के अझै AI बाट borrowed छ reveal गर्नुहुन्छ।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for history cause-and-effect with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable हुन्छन्। यो mode history cause-and-effect का लागि आफ्नै prompts, examples, र learning flow सहित tuned छ।

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from History Cause-and-Effect is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: History Cause-and-Effect बाट value पाउने fastest way AI लाई topic मात्र होइन, learning job दिनु हो। topic ले तपाईं केमा interested हुनुहुन्छ भन्छ। learning job ले कस्तो help चाहिन्छ भन्छ।

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: त्यसपछि session लाई अझ personal बनाउने constraint थप्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: यी starter हरूमध्ये एउटा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: mode लाई practice मा बदल्नुहोस्

entries.source: Use History Cause-and-Effect when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Economics Simulator. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: कामका लागि यही सही mode हो भने History Cause-and-Effect प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। सम्बन्धित path चाहनुहुन्छ भने Economics Simulator प्रयास गर्नुहोस्। study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, र active recall का लागि AI learning blog पनि browse गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।
